queries.question: Show all the students who use either a tablet or laptop, where either runs on Windows 10.
queries.sql:
SELECT Students.FullName
FROM Students
WHERE (Students.Personal_Computing_Devices = "Tablet" OR Students.Personal_Computing_Devices = "Laptop") AND Students.Operating_System = "Windows 10"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:Personal_Computing_Devices ?personal_computing_devices_w .
  ?students p:Personal_Computing_Devices ?personal_computing_devices_w2 .
  ?students p:Operating_System ?operating_system_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?personal_computing_devices_w) = "Tablet" || STR(?personal_computing_devices_w2) = "Laptop")) && STR(?operating_system_w) = "Windows 10"))
}

queries.question: Show all of the students who use a tablet, also show the students who use a latop running Windows 10.
queries.sql:
SELECT Students.FullName
FROM Students
WHERE Students.Personal_Computing_Devices = "Tablet" OR Students.Personal_Computing_Devices = "Laptop" AND Students.Operating_System = "Windows 10"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:Personal_Computing_Devices ?personal_computing_devices_w .
  ?students p:Personal_Computing_Devices ?personal_computing_devices_w2 .
  ?students p:Operating_System ?operating_system_w .
  FILTER((STR(?personal_computing_devices_w) = "Tablet" || (STR(?personal_computing_devices_w2) = "Laptop" && STR(?operating_system_w) = "Windows 10")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who has tablets and laptops with Windows 10?
